name: CDW Corp
summary: PART I Our Company CDW Corporation (together with its subsidiaries, the Company, CDW, we, us, or our), a Fortune 500 company and member of the S&P 500 Index, is a leading multi-brand provider of information technology (IT) solutions to business, government, education, and healthcare customers in the United States (US), the United Kingdom (UK), and Canada.
